bridge-type.label: BACnet/IP Network
bridge-type.description: Represents the local BACnet/IP network and runs device discovery.

parameter.name: broadcastAddress
parameter.label: Network / Broadcast Address
parameter.description: Select the network the BACnet devices are on (the list shows this machine's interfaces, like YABE), or type a subnet broadcast address such as 192.168.1.255.

parameter.name: localPort
parameter.label: Local Port
parameter.description: UDP port to bind (BACnet default is 47808).

parameter.name: discoveryTimeout
parameter.label: Discovery Timeout (s)
parameter.description: How long to listen for I-Am replies per scan.

parameter.name: backgroundDiscovery
parameter.label: Background Discovery
parameter.description: Automatically scan for devices in the background (initial scan shortly after the bridge comes online, then repeated on the interval below; new IPs are also probed immediately).

parameter.name: discoveryInterval
parameter.label: Background Scan Interval (min)
parameter.description: How often the background scan repeats. A full sweep is one unicast probe per host in the /24 subnet, so very short intervals create noticeable traffic.

parameter.name: autoCreateItems
parameter.label: Auto-create Items
parameter.description: Automatically create an Item for every object/channel and link it, with semantic tags derived from the BACnet object type (Measurement/Setpoint/Switch/Status, plus Temperature for °C objects). Items are removed again when the Thing is deleted.

parameter.name: pollInterval
parameter.label: Poll Interval (min)
parameter.description: Fallback poll of present values. COV (change-of-value push) is the primary update mechanism; this only catches missed notifications.

parameter.name: refreshInterval
parameter.label: Metadata Refresh (min)
parameter.description: How often to re-read the object-list and metadata (names, units, notification class) so new or renamed objects are picked up and COV subscriptions are renewed. 0 = off.

channel-type.label: Alarm State
channel-type.description: Current BACnet event-state (Normal/Off-Normal/Fault) of an alarm-capable object.

channel-type.label: Alarm
channel-type.description: Fires on BACnet event-state changes (off-normal, fault).
